title: Better Craftable Gunpowder & more
description: Adds realistic, easy farmable new gunpowder recipe to the game as well as some minor new features. See all in the mods description.
body:
# Craft Gunpowder easily!
This Mod introduces a simple crafting recipe for vanilla gunpowder with just 3 ingredients.
The crafting recipe is **inspired by the real life** and how gunpowder is really made.

![The new crafting recipe for gunpowder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32e429afeb9422c186b4a466f00c59da91e26827.png)

With a Piglin Bartering station and a simple blaze farm, this should be no problem at all.
## But wait, there is more:
This Mod introduces a new fuel item made from 4 gunpowder which burns for 30 seconds at a time!

![Crafting recipe for the better gunpowder fuel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e1de757819e22ea3c9371cd02b5a65697e42e87.png)
![The Better Gunpowder can be used to smelt for 30 seconds with just one single item!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cec15c2d7e18a5315dfc51f1b79212949a486c5.png)

And you also can always **craft it back into regular gunpowder**. Usefull for item management or if you want to store your gunpowder more compact. For example at a gunpowder farm to prevent chests to fill too fast.

![Better Gunpowder being crafted back into regular minecraft gunpowder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70210886dc52ef727b36808ffffffeba7a75074f.png)

## And there is even more:
You now can craft cheaper explosives with the new **Explosive Barrels**! Perfect for pirate themed builds as a dangerous decoration.

![Explosive Barrel crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b47154d4aaea45fc4ac1fc676de9db068ceb3d9e.png)
![Explosive Barrel in players inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14fbeb98d2c237f0946b155d985095695e9f3bd0.png)

You can light the Explosive Barrel in any way that you would do a normal TNT _(redstone, flame arrows, TNT explosion, flint and steel...)_

![Explosive Barrel from Better Craftable Gunpowder before exploding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aafdf43877cd5b9f8cc94373edd668efbac278e1_0.webp)
![Explosive Barrel from Better Craftable Gunpowder after exploding (1.21.10)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a537c17306a83144853cefec3c0a8867c706a663.png)

_(Right now, the Explosive Barrel is just an extention of the TntBlock.class, feel free to make changes to this mod. The repository is on my GitHub (link in mod-menu))_
